name: rf-cdp-consent-ledger
description: RF segment: 152-FZ consent ledger. Signed hash-chained consent evidence (ledger mechanics ported 1:1 from US modules/consent, law-agnostic) + a 152-FZ opt-in CMP that replaces the US CCPA/TCPA/GPC model. Builds an append-only chain from gateway consent receipts.
